race.comment: ZUCCHINI (12) is a three-year-old colt by Verrazano out of Last Cookie on debut for the Facundo F Santesteban stable. Looks set to run well. Betting watch recommended. AMERICAN MINE (7) finished 13 lengths from the winner in fourth last start over 1200m at this track, an improvement on his first-up 12th at this track the run before. Nicely placed to take this out. TAPE GOSIK (3) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1500m at this track, beaten 5 lengths into seventh. Best figures measure up nicely. Sure to run well. EL GRAN TENAZA (9) finished 13 lengths from the winner in eighth at his most recent appearance over 1300m at this track. Rates highly in this field and can turn things around.
